hero.title: Simple Software
hero.description1: Complete management of your company anywhere in the world.
hero.description2: All the numbers your company needs, always in your pocket. GetEasier simplifies companies' internal processes, transforming complex tasks into simple and accessible solutions.
hero.newsletterPlaceholder: Enter your email to receive updates
hero.newsletterSuccess: Thank you! You will receive our updates soon.

timeEasier.name: TimeEasier
timeEasier.tagline: Automatic Time Tracking. Increase your company's operational efficiency.
timeEasier.description: Time tracking doesn't have to be a friction point in companies' daily operations. With TimeEasier, clocking in and out becomes simple, fast, and reliable, whether through a tablet at the workplace or remotely. The system eliminates manual errors, reduces conflicts, ensures automatic history, and facilitates management control.

constructionEasier.name: ConstructionEasier
constructionEasier.tagline: All your project information in one place. Build with confidence.
constructionEasier.description: ConstructionEasier simplifies construction project management, enabling efficient control of works, materials, and teams. Centralize all your project information in one place and optimize construction management processes.

stockEasier.name: StockEasier
stockEasier.tagline: Total inventory control. Never run out of essential materials again.
stockEasier.description: StockEasier is an intuitive software that simplifies stock management, enabling efficient control of consumable materials. Centralize and optimize your inventory management processes in a practical and effective way.

woodEasier.name: WoodEasier
woodEasier.tagline: Simplified wood passport management. Compliance guaranteed.
woodEasier.description: WoodEasier is software designed to simplify the management of treated wood passports, especially in industries dealing with pallets and other wood products. It offers features to track wood origin, verify compliance with regulations, and DGAV phytosanitary inspection forms.

hero.title: Time tracking without complications
hero.description1: TimeEasier was designed and developed to meet the real needs of Portuguese companies regarding attendance control, labor documentation, and compliance with national legal requirements.
hero.description2: This module enables simple, rigorous, and fully digital work time management, ensuring transparency, compliance, and efficiency in the company's daily operations.

hourControl.title: Hour Control
hourControl.description: Hour control per employee with precision and transparency.

scheduleManagement.title: Schedule Management
scheduleManagement.description: Control of multiple schedules and schedule types (exempt from schedule, hourly paid, fixed schedule...).

absenceManagement.title: Absence Management
absenceManagement.description: Complete absence management per employee in an organized way.

vacationMap.title: Vacation Map
vacationMap.description: Visualization and management of the company's vacation map.

monthlyReport.title: Monthly Report
monthlyReport.description: Monthly hour report per employee in compliance with Article 202 of the Labor Code and ACT requirements.

documentManagement.title: Document Management
documentManagement.description: Document management per employee (Pay Slips, Reports, Employment Contracts, among others).

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.description: Time tracking with geolocation for greater security and control.

generalMonthlyReport.title: General Monthly Report
generalMonthlyReport.description: General monthly report for the entire company for strategic analysis.

hero.title: All your project information in one place
hero.description1: ConstructionEasier was developed in partnership with Portuguese construction companies, with the aim of simplifying the operational and financial control of construction projects — from initial planning to results analysis.
hero.description2: This module allows you to manage all ongoing projects, prepare upcoming ones, and consult the history of completed ones, ensuring total visibility, quick decision-making, and greater profitability per project.

costControl.title: Cost Control
costControl.description: Cost control per project (materials and labor) for rigorous financial management.

realtimeLocation.title: Real-time Location
realtimeLocation.description: Real-time location of employees per project for greater control and security.

stateProgress.title: State and Progress Management
stateProgress.description: Management of the state and progress of each project with real-time updates.

documentOrganization.title: Document Organization
documentOrganization.description: Organization and sharing of attachments and documentation per project.

centralDashboard.title: Central Dashboard
centralDashboard.description: Central dashboard for strategic analysis and global monitoring of all projects.

hero.title: Total inventory control
hero.description1: StockEasier was created to simplify and automate consumables management, enabling rigorous control of inputs, outputs, and stock levels, without the need for spreadsheets or manual processes.
hero.description2: With this module, the company has real-time updated information, reducing shortages, waste, and urgent purchases, ensuring greater operational efficiency.

movementRecord.title: Movement Record
movementRecord.description: Simple and fast recording of PPE and other consumables inputs and outputs.

continuousMonitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
continuousMonitoring.description: Continuous real-time monitoring of stock levels.

automaticAlerts.title: Automatic Alerts
automaticAlerts.description: Automatic restocking alerts when levels are low.

completeHistory.title: Complete History
completeHistory.description: Complete history of movements and consumption for analysis and auditing.

categoryManagement.title: Category Management
categoryManagement.description: Management by categories and storage locations for total organization.

epiReport.title: PPE Report
epiReport.description: PPE report per employee for control and compliance.

simultaneousAccess.title: Simultaneous Access
simultaneousAccess.description: Simultaneous and secure access for multiple users.

intuitiveInterface.title: Intuitive Interface
intuitiveInterface.description: Simple and intuitive interface, accessible from any device.

hero.title: Simplified wood passport management
hero.description1: WoodEasier was developed to meet DGAV legal requirements and the practical needs of companies working with treated wood.
hero.description2: With this module, the entire registration, traceability, and communication process becomes simple, fast, and fully compliant with Portuguese legislation. The platform ensures organization, transparency, and security at all stages — from wood reception to its dispatch — allowing the company to always be prepared for any audit or inspection.

quickRecord.title: Quick Record
quickRecord.description: Quick recording of batches and movements of treated wood in a simple and efficient way.

automaticEmission.title: Automatic Emission
automaticEmission.description: Automatic emission of DGAV reports and certificates in compliance with legislation.

integralTraceability.title: Integral Traceability
integralTraceability.description: Complete history of operations and integral traceability from reception to dispatch.

treatmentManagement.title: Treatment Management
treatmentManagement.description: Management of treatments, temperatures, and durations for total process control.

clearCommunication.title: Clear Communication
clearCommunication.description: Clear and reliable communication between administration and production.

auditPreparation.title: Audit Preparation
auditPreparation.description: Effortless preparation for inspections and audits, with all documentation organized.
